description: Note from Abū Sahl Levi (d. 1211), in Fustat, to his son Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi (d. 1212), in Qalyūb. In Judaeo-Arabic. (Identification based on handwriting and typical content and names.) He reports that Moshe's uncle (Abū Sahl's brother) ʿImrān no longer enters their home (cf. Moss. IV,27.2 and T-S 6J3.17). Abū Sahl told 'the rayyis' about the matter and he reports what the answer was, but it's very cryptic. Moshe's brother Abū l-Ḥasan (Yedutun ha-Levi) received a robe of honor (ukhliʿa ʿalayhi).
tags: Moshe b. Levi, Abu Sahl Levi
